name: ÉLISE Q-Switched ND:YAG Laser Device
shortDescription: Premium nanosecond ND:YAG laser in rosegold or ice silver finish. Tattoo removal, pigment treatment, carbon peeling with 3 wavelengths.
description: The ÉLISE is a state-of-the-art nanosecond laser device designed to combine technological efficiency with impeccable aesthetic design. With its elegant rosegold or ice silver casing and clean lines, the ÉLISE is not only a reliable, high-energy treatment tool but also becomes the aesthetic centrepiece of your treatment room.
metaTitle: ÉLISE Nanosecond Laser – Pigment & Tattoo Removal, Carbon Peeling
metaDescription: The ÉLISE premium nanosecond ND:YAG laser for pigment and tattoo removal, carbon peeling and skin rejuvenation – style and efficiency combined.

videoDescription.headline: ÉLISE – Where technology meets design
paragraphs: The ÉLISE delivers not only professional performance – its appearance also represents premium quality. In elegant rosegold or ice silver finish, it becomes the aesthetic centrepiece of your treatment room.

The nanosecond laser's explosive effect penetrates the upper layer of the skin, reaches the dermis layer, and breaks pigments into tiny particles that the body breaks down and eliminates through the lymphatic system.
It operates on three wavelengths (1064 nm, 532 nm, 1320 nm), making it suitable for everything from tattoo removal to carbon peeling – at the highest quality.

featureRows.headline: Why is the ÉLISE the favourite in the premium category?
featureRows.subtitle: Nanosecond technology, aesthetic design, professional results

features.title: Nanosecond pulse technology
features.description:
The ÉLISE's nanosecond pulses release energy extremely quickly, targeting pigments with precision. The short pulse duration minimises heat load on surrounding tissues, enabling safe, scar-free treatments.

Advantages of nanosecond technology:

Targeted pigment destruction with minimal skin damage
Faster healing time for clients
Effective pigment removal with fewer sessions
Safe treatment even on sensitive areas
features.highlight: The nanosecond pulse breaks pigments into tiny particles that the body naturally eliminates.

features.title: 3 wavelengths – complete treatment range
features.description:
The ÉLISE operates on three wavelengths, covering every pigment type and skin treatment need with a single device.

Handpieces:

1064 nm – dark pigments (black, blue, grey) and deep tattoo removal
532 nm – light pigments (red, brown, yellowish) and surface spots
1320 nm – carbon peeling (blackdoll), skin surface cleansing and rejuvenation

features.title: Versatile treatment options
features.description:
The ÉLISE is not just for tattoo removal – its treatment range is exceptionally broad, allowing you to offer multiple profitable services with a single device.

Application areas:

Body tattoo removal
Eyebrow tattoo removal
Pigment spots, freckles
Sun spots, age spots
Acne scar fading
Carbon peeling
Skin tone evening
Skin rejuvenation, pore cleansing

features.title: Premium design – the jewel of your salon
features.description:
When designing the ÉLISE, special attention was paid to ensuring the device represents premium quality not only in performance but also in appearance. Elegant rosegold or ice silver casing, clean design language.

Design features:

Elegant rosegold or ice silver finish
Clean, modern design language
Professional appearance in the treatment room
Premium client experience through design
features.highlight: The ÉLISE becomes the aesthetic centrepiece of your treatment room – clients immediately sense the premium quality.

training.headline: Device operator training – official certified course
training.intro: An official, certified training course registered in the FAR system is available for the ÉLISE ND:YAG laser. The curriculum was developed under the mentorship of an instructor with examination authority working in the healthcare sector, and is based on the professional materials of a Russian laser specialist physician.
items: Operating principles of nanosecond ND:YAG laser technology
Wavelengths and application areas (tattoo, pigment, carbon peeling)
Treatment protocols for different pigment types and skin conditions
Contraindications, skin type assessment and safe treatment
Carbon peeling and skin rejuvenation treatment practice
closingParagraphs: The training aims to enable participants to safely and legally apply the ÉLISE laser for cosmetic and aesthetic treatments.
Upon completion of the training, an official FAR certificate is issued.

testimonials.name: Lakatos Vivien
testimonials.text: The ÉLISE is not only beautiful but effective too. <mark>My clients always compliment the machine's appearance – and the results speak for themselves</mark>. The nanosecond technology is truly gentler, with shorter healing times.

expertQuote.quote: The ÉLISE is the embodiment of the premium category: nanosecond technology, elegant design and reliable performance. The perfect choice for those who want to deliver the best not only in technology but also in client experience.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What is the advantage of a nanosecond laser over a traditional ND:YAG?
faq.answer: The nanosecond pulse duration releases energy extremely quickly, causing pigments to break into tiny particles while surrounding tissues receive minimal heat load. This means faster healing, fewer sessions and lower risk of scarring.

faq.question: What tattoo colours can the ÉLISE treat?
faq.answer: The 1064 nm wavelength treats dark pigments (black, blue, grey), while the 532 nm treats light, warm shades (red, brown, yellowish). This means virtually every tattoo colour – including permanent makeup – can be effectively removed.

faq.question: Is the ÉLISE available in multiple colours?
faq.answer: Yes! The ÉLISE is available in elegant rosegold and ice silver finishes. Both variants have identical technical specifications – the choice is purely an aesthetic preference.

faq.question: What is carbon peeling / blackdoll treatment?
faq.answer: Carbon peeling (blackdoll) is a premium facial treatment where a special carbon layer is applied to the skin, then removed with 1320 nm laser pulses. The result: deep cleansing, pore tightening, sebum regulation and collagen stimulation. An extremely popular and profitable service.

faq.question: How quickly does the ÉLISE pay for itself?
faq.answer: Despite the premium price category, the ÉLISE typically pays for itself in 3-5 months with 3-5 clients per day. Tattoo removal costs 15,000-50,000 Ft per session, carbon peeling 15,000-30,000 Ft. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What training comes with the ÉLISE?
faq.answer: An official, FAR-registered certified device operator training is included FREE with the device purchase (worth 79,990 Ft). The training covers everything from the basics of nanosecond technology to practical treatments.

faq.question: Is it possible to view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the ÉLISE ND:YAG laser in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.
